top3.sql:
SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN e.type = 'meeting' THEN exp.cost ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / SUM(exp.cost)) AS percentage_cost_meeting_events
FROM expense exp
JOIN budget b ON exp.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
JOIN event e ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN e.type = 'meeting' THEN ex.cost ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / SUM(ex.cost) AS percentage_cost_meeting_events
FROM expense ex
JOIN budget b ON ex.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
JOIN event e ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id;

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN e.type = 'meeting' THEN exp.cost ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / SUM(exp.cost)) AS percentage_cost_meeting_events
FROM expense exp
JOIN budget b ON exp.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
JOIN event e ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id;

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN ev.type = 'meeting' THEN ex.cost ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(ex.cost), 0)) AS percentage_cost_meeting_events
FROM expense ex
JOIN budget bu ON ex.link_to_budget = bu.budget_id
JOIN event ev ON bu.link_to_event = ev.event_id;

SELECT 
    ROUND(
        CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN e.type = 'meeting' THEN ex.cost ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(ex.cost), 0),
        2
    ) AS percentage_cost_meeting_events
FROM expense ex
JOIN budget b ON ex.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
JOIN event e ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id;

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN e.type = 'meeting' THEN exp.cost ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / SUM(exp.cost)) AS percentage_cost_meeting_events
FROM expense exp
JOIN budget b ON exp.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
JOIN event e ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id;

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN ev.type = 'meeting' THEN ex.cost ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(ex.cost), 0)) AS percentage_cost_meeting_events
FROM expense ex
JOIN budget bu ON ex.link_to_budget = bu.budget_id
JOIN event ev ON bu.link_to_event = ev.event_id;

SELECT 
    ROUND(
        CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN e.type = 'meeting' THEN ex.cost ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(ex.cost), 0),
        2
    ) AS percentage_cost_meeting_events
FROM expense ex
JOIN budget b ON ex.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
JOIN event e ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id;

final.sql:
SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN e.type = 'meeting' THEN exp.cost ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / SUM(exp.cost)) AS percentage_cost_meeting_events
FROM expense exp
JOIN budget b ON exp.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
JOIN event e ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id;
